_doc: 🆕 [H.2 / Sir 2026-05-28 15:30 真痛 image 1 anchor] AutoArbiter thread 两层耦合 vocab.
thread = 'Sir mentioned a significant life event or achievement', e.g.
'Built and deployed J.A.R.V.I.S.' / 'P0+19-5 architecture split done'
强 ACT 信号 (任 1 hit → bypass LLM 直 activate):
(a) STM Sir 复述 title (token overlap ≥ min_title_token_overlap)
(b) Sir 文字 milestone 词 (vocab.milestone_keywords) AND detail 不空
强 REJ 信号 (任 1 hit → bypass LLM 直 reject):
(b) detail 字数 < min_detail_chars OR detail 空
(c) title 字数 > max_title_chars (太长不是 thread title)
(d) 注: jaccard ≥ 0.6 dedup 现 _pre_activate_dedup_check 已覆盖, 此处不重做
无强信号 → LLM edge case fallback (现有 _llm_evaluate path).
准则 6 持久化, Sir CLI scripts/auto_arbiter_thread_vocab_dump.py 可改.

_doc_config: milestone_keywords: Sir STM 含 milestone 类词 + detail 不空 → 强 ACT
min_title_token_overlap: Sir 复述 title 词级 overlap ≥ N → 强 ACT (类 inside_joke)
min_title_words: title 词数 < N 直 reject (太短不是 thread)
max_title_chars: title 字数 > N 直 reject (不是 thread title)
min_detail_chars: detail 字数 < N 直 reject (无 detail 不算 milestone)
stm_lookback_turns: STM 扫近 N turn (复述 detect 用)
log_decisions: bg_log 每次 strong-gate hit
